4.title: JVM GC suspension time
4.query:
timeseries suspension_time = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.suspension_time), by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.process_group_instance, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(suspension_time) desc
| limit 10

5.title: JVM GC invocations
5.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries collection_count = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.collection_count), by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.process_group_instance, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(collection_count) desc
| limit 10

6.title: JVM GC time
6.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries collection_time = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.collection_time), by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, jvm.memory.pool.name, process.pid, jvm.gc.name }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.process_group_instance, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(collection_time) desc
| limit 10

10.title: JVM memory (committed)
10.query:
timeseries committed = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.memory_pool.committed), by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, jvm.memory.pool.name, process.pid }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.process_group_instance, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(committed) desc
| limit 10

11.title: JVM memory (used)
11.query:
timeseries used = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.memory_pool.used), by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance, jvm.memory.pool.name, process.pid }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.process_group_instance, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(used) desc
| limit 10

12.title: JVM thread count
12.query:
timeseries count = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.threads.count), by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.process_group_instance, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 10
